sub_modules.usm_gaussian3x3: Combinational 3x3 Gaussian stencil using fixed coefficients [1 2 1; 2 4 2; 1 2 1] normalized by 16.
sub_modules.usm_highpass: Combinational pointwise subtraction stage that computes signed high-frequency detail as original minus blurred pixel.
sub_modules.usm_gain_scale: Combinational pointwise gain stage that multiplies the signed high-frequency component by the unsigned gain input.
sub_modules.usm_reconstruct_sat: Combinational pointwise reconstruction stage that adds scaled detail back to the original pixel and saturates to the output pixel range.
